basicUpgrades.name: Resilience
basicUpgrades.description: Spinning your sword drains 10% less stamina

basicUpgrades.name: Heavy bullet
basicUpgrades.description: Gain a special bullet that does 1.5x damage

rareUpgrades.name: Tenacity
rareUpgrades.description: Spinning your sword drains 35% less stamina

rareUpgrades.name: Confusing Firepower?
rareUpgrades.description: Gain a special bullet that confuses enemies causing them to run away from you

legendaryUpgrades.name: Midas Touch
legendaryUpgrades.description: Gain double the amount of gold for killing enemies.

legendaryUpgrades.name: Lifesteal
legendaryUpgrades.description: For every 20 enemies you kill, you heal one heart.

legendaryUpgrades.name: Bullet of Life
legendaryUpgrades.description: Gain a special bullet that heals you if you kill an enemy with it.

legendaryUpgrades.name: Endless Spin
legendaryUpgrades.description: Spinning your sword drains 70% less stamina.

legendaryUpgrades.name: Vitality
legendaryUpgrades.description: Gain two hearts of health every wave.

corruptUpgrades.name: Cursed Revolver
corruptUpgrades.description: Increase your firerate by 90% but only fire special bullets every 24 shots.

corruptUpgrades.name: Mutual Destruction
corruptUpgrades.description: You one shot all enemies, but all enemies one shot you.

corruptUpgrades.name: Chained Greatsword
corruptUpgrades.description: Your sword stuns and applies heavy knockback to enemies, but spinning it drains 90% more stamina.

corruptUpgrades.name: Accelerator
corruptUpgrades.description: You can move twice as fast but so do the enemies.
